author: bsky.app
alt_text: We've increased the number of photos you can attach to a post from 4 to 10. That's why we're adding a carousel.

author: bsky.app
alt_text:
The carousel only shows for posts with at least 5 photos.
Old posts with photos will continue to show the regular grid layout.

author: propublica.org
alt_text:
Screenshot of John Oliver on Last Week Tonight. He is citing a ProPublica story dated Nov. 12, 2025 with a headline that reads "How Trump Has Exploited Pardons and Clemency to Reward Allies and Supporters."

An on-screen excerpt of that story reads:
"I told my guy he'd probably be better off if he broke into the Capitol or made a major donation to Trump's inauguration."

author: propublica.org
alt_text: Screenshot of John Oliver on Last Week Tonight. He is citing a ProPublica story dated March 30, 2026 with a headline that reads "A Nursing Home Owner Got a Trump Pardon. The Families of His Patients Got Nothing."

alt_text: Graphic displaying three men's photos, stacked on top of each other, in a column on the left. Text on right reads: Gerardo del Valle, Alejandro Bonilla Suarez and Edwin Corona Ramos. ProPublica, The Texas Tribune, Alianza Rebelde Investiga, and Cazadores de Fake News. Livingston Award, International Reporting.
